languages.text: "Вольный Торговец, произошла катастрофа, масштаб которой усугубляется вопиющей некомпетентностью генетора Ферренца! Нунциус перестал говорить! Ферренц вызвался посодействовать в осмотре дражайшего коллеги, после чего набрался дерзости заявлять, что тот абсолютно исправен, и он отказывается производить с Нунциусом дальнейшие манипуляции. Молю, найдите меня на мостике и помогите вразумить этого безумца!"

"Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"
languages.original_text: "Вольный Торговец, произошла катастрофа, масштаб которой усугубляется вопиющей некомпетентностью генетора Ферренца! Нунциус перестал говорить! Ферренц вызвался посодействовать в осмотре дражайшего коллеги, после чего набрался дерзости заявлять, что тот абсолютно исправен, и он отказывается производить с Нунциусом дальнейшие манипуляции. Молю, найдите меня на мостике и помогите вразумить этого безумца!"

Ferrenz offered to assist in examining of my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

languages.text: "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}! Katastrophe! Nuncius spricht nicht mehr! Und schlimmer noch ... er wird von diesem empörend inkompetenten Genetor Ferrenz zusammengesetzt! Ferrenz hat angeboten, bei der Untersuchung meines geschätzten Kollegen zu assistieren und besitzt nun die Kühnheit, zu behaupten, er wäre voll funktionsfähig. Seitdem weigert er sich, weitere Untersuchungen an Nuncius durchzuführen. Ich flehe Euch an, kommt zu mir auf die Brücke und helft mir, diesen Wahnsinnigen zur Vernunft zu bringen!"
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

traits.locale_text: {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}! Katastrophe! Nuncius spricht nicht mehr! Und schlimmer noch ... er wird von diesem empörend inkompetenten Genetor Ferrenz zusammengesetzt! Ferrenz hat angeboten, bei der Untersuchung meines geschätzten Kollegen zu assistieren und besitzt nun die Kühnheit, zu behaupten, er wäre voll funktionsfähig. Seitdem weigert er sich, weitere Untersuchungen an Nuncius durchzuführen. Ich flehe Euch an, kommt zu mir auf die Brücke und helft mir, diesen Wahnsinnigen zur Vernunft zu bringen!"

languages.text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, c'est une catastrophe ! Nuncius ne parle plus ! Et la situation n'est pas près de s'améliorer, vu l'incompétence crasse du genetor Ferrenz ! Ferrenz a proposé d'assister à l'examen de mon très estimé collègue et a ensuite eu le culot d'affirmer qu'il était parfaitement fonctionnel. Il refuse à présent d'effectuer la moindre procédure supplémentaire sur Nuncius ! Je vous en supplie, rejoignez-moi sur la passerelle pour m'aider à lui faire entendre raison ! »
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, c'est une catastrophe ! Nuncius ne parle plus ! Et la situation n'est pas près de s'améliorer, vu l'incompétence crasse du genetor Ferrenz ! Ferrenz a proposé d'assister à l'examen de mon très estimé collègue et a ensuite eu le culot d'affirmer qu'il était parfaitement fonctionnel. Il refuse à présent d'effectuer la moindre procédure supplémentaire sur Nuncius ! Je vous en supplie, rejoignez-moi sur la passerelle pour m'aider à lui faire entendre raison ! »

languages.text: “行商浪人，大事不好，努恩修斯不说话了！更可怕的是，基因士费伦茨简直无能到了极点！他主动提出要协助检查我那尊敬的同僚，结果却厚颜无耻地声称他功能完全正常。现在他拒绝再对努恩修斯进行任何处理！我恳求您，到舰桥来找我，帮我让这个疯子清醒清醒！”
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，大事不好，努恩修斯不说话了！更可怕的是，基因士费伦茨简直无能到了极点！他主动提出要协助检查我那尊敬的同僚，结果却厚颜无耻地声称他功能完全正常。现在他拒绝再对努恩修斯进行任何处理！我恳求您，到舰桥来找我，帮我让这个疯子清醒清醒！”

languages.text: «Comerciante Independiente, ha sucedido algo terrible. ¡Nuncius ha dejado de hablar! Y, lo que es peor, ¡la suma incompetencia del genetor Ferrenz agrava la situación! Ferrenz se ofreció a ayudar en el análisis de mi estimado colega, y ahora tiene la osadía de decir que funciona perfectamente. ¡Se niega a tratar más a Nuncius! Se lo imploro, ¡venga a verme en el puente y haga que este lunático entre en razón!».
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

traits.locale_text: «Comerciante Independiente, ha sucedido algo terrible. ¡Nuncius ha dejado de hablar! Y, lo que es peor, ¡la suma incompetencia del genetor Ferrenz agrava la situación! Ferrenz se ofreció a ayudar en el análisis de mi estimado colega, y ahora tiene la osadía de decir que funciona perfectamente. ¡Se niega a tratar más a Nuncius! Se lo imploro, ¡venga a verme en el puente y haga que este lunático entre en razón!».

languages.text: "ローグ・トレーダーよ、大惨事が発生した--ヌンシウスが言葉を発しなくなったのだ！さらに悪いことに、ジェネター・フェレンツの無能さが拍車をかけている！フェレンツ氏は私の尊敬する同僚の検査を手伝うと申し出たが、彼は完全に機能すると言い張る大胆さしか持ち合わせていない。彼は今、ヌンシウスにこれ以上の処置をすることを拒否している！お願いだから、ブリッジで私を見つけて、この狂人を正気に戻すのを手伝って！"
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"

languages.text: "Hür Tacir, felaket! Nuncius konuşmayı bıraktı! Daha da kötüsü, bu duruma Genetör Ferrenz'in bariz beceriksizliği eklendi! Ferrenz, saygıdeğer meslektaşımı muayene etmeyi teklif etti. Ayrıca onun tamamen işlevsel olduğunu iddia etme cüretini gösterdi. Şimdi Nuncius üzerinde daha fazla işlem yapmayı reddediyor! Yalvarıyorum, köprüde görüşelim. Bu delinin aklını başına toplamasına yardım edin!"
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, a catastrophe has occurred — Nuncius has stopped speaking! Worse still, it is compounded by the flagrant incompetence of Genetor Ferrenz! Ferrenz offered to assist in examining my esteemed colleague, only to have the audacity to claim he is perfectly functional. He now refuses to perform any further procedures upon Nuncius! I implore you, find me on the bridge and help me bring this madman to his senses!"
